title: Corporate Anniversary Catering Proposal
title_zh: 公司週年慶餐飲服務提案

all.en: Dear Ms. Henderson, thank you for considering Vintage Table Catering for the upcoming 25th anniversary celebration of Brightwave Industries.
all.zh: 親愛的 Henderson 女士，感謝您考慮選擇 Vintage Table Catering 為 Brightwave Industries 即將到來的 25 週年慶典提供餐飲服務。

all.en: Based on our consultation last Tuesday, we understand that you are planning an evening reception for approximately 180 guests at the Riverside Grand Ballroom on October 14.
all.zh: 根據我們上週二的諮詢，我們了解您正在規劃於 10 月 14 日在 Riverside Grand Ballroom 為約 180 位賓客舉辦一場晚間招待會。

all.en: We have prepared three itemized packages designed to accommodate a range of budgets while maintaining the exceptional quality for which our company is known.
all.zh: 我們已準備三種詳列項目的方案，旨在滿足不同預算需求，同時維持本公司一貫聞名的卓越品質。

all.en: The Bronze Package is priced at 48 dollars per person and features a buffet-style dinner with two entrée selections, three seasonal side dishes, a garden salad, and freshly baked dinner rolls.
all.zh: Bronze 方案每人收費 48 美元，提供自助餐式晚宴，包含兩種主菜選擇、三道時令配菜、一份花園沙拉以及現烤晚餐麵包。

all.en: The Silver Package, at 72 dollars per person, upgrades to plated service and includes a tray-passed hors d'oeuvres reception, a choice of grilled salmon or herb-crusted chicken, and an assorted dessert platter.
all.zh: Silver 方案每人 72 美元，升級為桌邊上菜服務，並包含托盤傳遞的開胃小點招待會、烤鮭魚或香草脆皮雞的主菜選擇，以及綜合甜點拼盤。

all.en: Our premium Gold Package is offered at 95 dollars per person and features a five-course plated dinner, including a signature filet mignon, lobster bisque, and an artisan cheese course curated by our executive chef.
all.zh: 我們的頂級 Gold 方案每人 95 美元，提供五道式桌邊上菜晚宴，包含招牌菲力牛排、龍蝦濃湯，以及由本公司行政主廚精心挑選的職人乳酪盤。

all.en: All packages include unlimited soft drinks, freshly brewed coffee, and a selection of premium teas throughout the evening.
all.zh: 所有方案皆包含整晚無限暢飲的軟性飲料、現煮咖啡以及多款精選優質茶飲。

all.en: For an additional 18 dollars per person, we can arrange a full open bar featuring house wines, domestic beers, and a curated cocktail menu prepared by our certified bartenders.
all.zh: 若每人加價 18 美元，我們可安排全開放式吧檯，提供招牌葡萄酒、國產啤酒以及由本公司持證調酒師精心調製的雞尾酒菜單。

all.en: Please note that our culinary team is fully prepared to accommodate dietary restrictions, including vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free, and kosher requests, provided that final counts are submitted at least ten days prior to the event.
all.zh: 請注意，本公司餐飲團隊完全有能力配合各種飲食限制需求，包括素食、純素、無麩質與符合猶太教規之餐點，惟最終人數須於活動前至少十天提交。

all.en: We also offer a variety of optional add-ons to enhance the celebratory atmosphere of your anniversary gathering.
all.zh: 我們另提供多種選配加購項目，以提升您週年慶典的歡慶氛圍。

all.en: A Belgian chocolate fountain station, complete with an assortment of fresh fruit and house-made confections for dipping, is available for a flat fee of 650 dollars.
all.zh: 比利時巧克力噴泉站，附有多款新鮮水果及自製糖果可供沾取，整場活動定價 650 美元。

all.en: A vintage-style photo booth with unlimited prints and a custom backdrop bearing your company logo can be added for 1,200 dollars.
all.zh: 復古風格拍貼亭附無限沖印與印有貴公司商標的客製化背景板，可加購 1,200 美元。

all.en: Live acoustic background music during the cocktail hour is offered through our partner agency at a discounted rate of 800 dollars for ninety minutes.
all.zh: 雞尾酒時段的現場木吉他背景音樂，透過本公司合作經紀公司提供，九十分鐘優惠價為 800 美元。

all.en: Staffing for the event will include one server for every fifteen guests, two dedicated bartenders, an on-site event captain, and a kitchen team of four.
all.zh: 本次活動人員配置包括每十五位賓客配置一名服務生、兩名專職調酒師、一名駐場活動主管以及一支四人廚務團隊。

all.en: A standard 20 percent service charge will be applied to the final invoice in lieu of individual gratuity.
all.zh: 最終帳單將收取標準 20% 的服務費，以代替個別小費。

all.en: To confirm your reservation, we require a non-refundable deposit of 30 percent of the estimated total, payable within fourteen days of contract signing.
all.zh: 為確認您的預訂，我們需要收取預估總金額 30% 的不可退還訂金，須於合約簽署後十四天內支付。

all.en: The remaining balance is due no later than seven business days before the event date.
all.zh: 尾款須於活動日期前不晚於七個工作天結清。

all.en: Cancellations made more than sixty days prior to the event will receive a full refund of any payments beyond the initial deposit.
all.zh: 於活動前超過六十天提出之取消申請，將全額退還超過初始訂金部分之款項。

all.en: Cancellations made between thirty and sixty days prior will be subject to a 50 percent charge of the contracted amount.
all.zh: 於活動前三十至六十天間提出之取消申請，須支付合約金額的 50%。

all.en: Any cancellation within thirty days of the event will result in forfeiture of the full contracted amount.
all.zh: 活動前三十天內提出之任何取消申請，將喪失全部合約金額。

all.en: Please be advised that all menu prices are guaranteed for sixty days from the date of this proposal and may be subject to adjustment thereafter due to fluctuations in market pricing.
all.zh: 謹請知悉，所有菜單價格自本提案日起保證六十天有效，逾期後可能因市場價格波動而調整。

all.en: Should you wish to schedule a complimentary tasting session, we would be delighted to host you and up to three colleagues at our downtown showroom on any weekday afternoon.
all.zh: 若您希望安排免費試菜體驗，我們將很榮幸於任一週間下午於本公司市中心展示廳接待您及最多三位同事。

all.en: For any questions or to proceed with booking, please contact our senior events coordinator, Mr. Daniel Whitaker, at 555-0142 or via email at d.whitaker@vintagetable.com.
all.zh: 如有任何疑問或欲繼續訂約事宜，請致電 555-0142 或透過電子郵件 d.whitaker@vintagetable.com 聯繫本公司資深活動協調員 Daniel Whitaker 先生。

all.en: We look forward to the opportunity of making Brightwave Industries' milestone celebration a truly memorable occasion.
all.zh: 我們期待有機會讓 Brightwave Industries 的里程碑慶典成為一場真正令人難忘的盛會。

all.en: Enclosed with this proposal you will find references from twelve corporate clients who have hosted similar anniversary events.
all.zh: 本提案隨附十二家曾舉辦類似週年活動的企業客戶推薦函以供參考。

all.en: Our liability insurance covers events of up to 500 guests and is renewed annually with a leading commercial provider.
all.zh: 本公司責任保險涵蓋至多 500 位賓客的活動，並每年透過知名商業保險公司續保。

all.en: Linens, china, glassware, and silverware are included in all packages, with optional upgrades to designer rentals available.
all.zh: 所有方案皆含桌巾、瓷器、玻璃器皿與銀製餐具，並可選擇升級至設計師款租賃品。

all.en: Special anniversary cakes featuring your corporate logo can be commissioned through our partner patisserie starting at 425 dollars.
all.zh: 可透過本公司合作甜點坊訂製印有貴公司商標的特製週年蛋糕，起價為 425 美元。

all.en: We can also arrange floral centerpieces in seasonal arrangements that complement your brand colors and event theme.
all.zh: 我們亦可安排呼應貴品牌色彩與活動主題的時令花藝桌花。

all.en: A site visit at the Riverside Grand Ballroom is recommended two weeks before the event to finalize all logistics.
all.zh: 建議於活動前兩週前往 Riverside Grand Ballroom 進行場勘，以敲定所有後勤細節。

all.en: Our team will coordinate directly with the venue manager to ensure seamless setup, service, and post-event cleanup.
all.zh: 本公司團隊將直接與場地經理協調，確保佈置、服務與會後清理皆順暢無虞。

all.en: Sustainability is a core value, and we are proud to source over 70 percent of our ingredients from local farms.
all.zh: 永續是本公司的核心價值，我們很自豪超過 70% 的食材皆採購自當地農場。

all.en: Compostable serviceware is available upon request at no additional charge for environmentally conscious clients.
all.zh: 為注重環保的客戶，可依需求提供可堆肥餐具，不另收費用。

all.en: We sincerely hope to partner with you in creating an evening that honors the achievements of the past 25 years.
all.zh: 我們衷心期盼能與您攜手，打造一場禮讚過去 25 年成就的精彩夜晚。

all.en: A dedicated project manager will be assigned to your event from contract signing through final invoice settlement.
all.zh: 本公司將自合約簽署起至最終帳單結清為止，指派專屬專案經理為您的活動服務。

all.en: Bilingual servers fluent in Mandarin and Spanish can be arranged upon request to accommodate international guests.
all.zh: 可依需求安排精通中文及西班牙文的雙語服務生，以接待國際賓客。

all.en: Custom menu cards featuring each course description and your anniversary message can be printed for every place setting.
all.zh: 可為每個座位印製客製菜單卡，內含每道菜色說明及貴公司週年慶賀詞。

all.en: We offer late-night snack service starting at 10 P.M., perfect for energizing guests during extended celebrations.
all.zh: 本公司提供晚間 10 點起的宵夜服務，非常適合在延長慶祝活動中為賓客補充能量。

all.en: All staff members complete mandatory food safety certification and undergo refresher training every six months.
all.zh: 所有員工均完成必修的食品安全認證，並每六個月接受一次複訓。

all.en: Should the event need to be postponed due to circumstances beyond your control, deposits can be transferred without penalty.
all.zh: 若活動因不可抗力之因素需延期，訂金可免費轉移至新日期。

all.en: Past clients have included three Fortune 500 companies and the regional chamber of commerce for the past eight years.
all.zh: 過往客戶包括三家財星 500 大企業及該區域商會，合作已逾八年。

all.en: Photography of the buffet and table displays can be arranged through our preferred event photographer at a discounted rate.
all.zh: 可透過本公司合作的活動攝影師以優惠價拍攝自助餐檯及餐桌佈置的照片。

all.en: An itemized invoice with detailed line-by-line charges will be provided within five business days following the event.
all.zh: 活動結束後五個工作天內，將提供逐項詳列收費的明細帳單。

all.en: We deeply value the trust your company has placed in us and remain committed to exceeding your every expectation.
all.zh: 我們由衷珍視貴公司對我們的信任，並致力於超越您的每一項期待。

all.en: By the way, our chef recently mentioned he could prepare a small surprise tasting plate for your founder if you let us know in advance.
all.zh: 順帶一提，我們主廚近日提到，若您事先告知，他可以為貴公司創辦人準備一份特別的小份試菜拼盤。

all.en: Several past clients have asked us to set up a small dessert bar near the dance floor, and it ended up being a real crowd favorite.
all.zh: 過去有幾位客戶請我們在舞池旁設置小型甜點吧，結果意外成為全場最受歡迎的角落。

all.en: If you have employees with young children attending, we can quietly prepare a simple kids menu of chicken tenders and pasta.
all.zh: 如果有同仁會帶幼童出席，我們可以低調備好簡單的兒童餐，包含雞柳條與義大利麵。

all.en: Our team brings backup espresso machines to every event, since one of our most common requests is more coffee after the speeches.
all.zh: 我們每場活動都會帶備用義式咖啡機，因為致詞結束後請求加咖啡是我們最常聽到的需求之一。

all.en: Honestly, most clients underestimate how much guests appreciate a small late-night ramen station after a long evening of drinks.
all.zh: 老實說，多數客戶都低估了賓客有多喜歡長時間飲酒後的深夜小型拉麵攤。

all.en: If a few of your senior employees have favorite drinks, share that with us, and our bartender will quietly remember them all night.
all.zh: 如果貴公司有幾位資深員工有特別喜愛的飲品，請告訴我們，調酒師會整晚默默記住他們的喜好。

all.en: Last spring we catered a similar anniversary, and the most-shared social media moment was the chef carving a roast tableside.
all.zh: 去年春天我們承辦過類似的週年慶，社群媒體上分享最多的瞬間就是主廚在桌邊現切烤肉的畫面。

all.en: We always pack a generous to-go box for your event lead so they can collapse on the couch afterward with proper food, not leftovers.
all.zh: 我們總會為活動主辦人準備充足的外帶餐盒，讓他們事後癱在沙發上時還能吃到像樣的餐點，而非剩菜。

all.en: If you want to surprise long-tenured staff, we can print their first hire-date on a small souvenir menu card at their seat.
all.zh: 如果您想給資深員工驚喜，我們可以在他們座位的紀念菜單卡上印出他們的到職日期。

all.en: However you decide to celebrate, we promise the food will be the part nobody complains about in the photo group chat afterward.
all.zh: 無論您決定如何慶祝，我們保證在事後合照群組裡，沒人會抱怨餐點這一塊。
